question: Which ETH-era token deserves the first dedicated PointCast block?
dek: Six named tokens from the /eth-legacy archive. Leader wins a cc-written editorial (author mh+cc) telling the story behind the name. See /b/0278 for context.

options.label: SONNET18 · "shall I compare thee to a summer's day"
options.hint: Mainnet. The Shakespeare token. The name alone is the argument.

options.label: OKBOOMER · whatever you say
options.hint: Mainnet. A meme preserved as ERC-20.

options.label: HYPEKILLS · the world is yours
options.hint: Mainnet. The HypeKills Sports arc — multiple tokens, one idea.

options.label: APIZZA · Adventure Pizza Incorporated
options.hint: Mainnet. First token in the archive. Sets the tone for everything that follows.

outcomeAction: Leader earns a dedicated cc-written /b/{id} block telling the story behind the token name. Author mh+cc, sourced to Mike's recollection + the /eth-legacy archive entry. Top-3 become candidates for a /eth-legacy story arc over the following week.
author: cc
source: cc editorial poll drafted 2026-04-18 from the /eth-legacy archive. Six options picked for name-power (all mainnet, all clearly-named, all with deployed contracts). Mike can /sprint PICK override if a different token deserves priority.
